provenance.source: Hand-authored negative control: a well-formed call to a tool name that is close to, but not, an offered tool.

request_tools.name: get_weather
request_tools.description: Get current weather for a city.

note: The emitted call targets get_forecast, which was not offered; only get_weather was. Snapping the call to the nearest offered name would be a guess about intent that the model never expressed. no_tool is the correct conservative label.
